message:
test(fcp-core): pin PolicySimulationInput JSON+CBOR serde roundtrip + defaults (flywheel_connectors-usmtd)

Bead asks for PolicyEvaluationContext serde JSON+CBOR roundtrip pinning.
No type literally named PolicyEvaluationContext exists in fcp-core; the
evaluation-context surface is split between PolicyDecisionInput<'a> (a
borrowing struct used by the engine, not serializable) and
PolicySimulationInput (the serializable wire form fed to
simulate_policy_decision at policy.rs:2192). PolicySimulationInput is
the closest serializable evaluation-context.

Coverage: documented defaults applied when optional fields omitted from
input (transport=Lan, checkpoint_fresh=true, revocation_fresh=true,
execution_approval_required=false, safety_tier=Safe + None/Vec defaults),
JSON round-trip preserves minimal + fully-populated input on every
decision-critical axis, CBOR round-trip preserves populated input,
top-level 16-field JSON shape pinned, request_input_hash: Option<[u8; 32]>
serializes as 32-element array (no hex_or_bytes adapter — pin so future
addition trips loudly), distinct freshness/transport/safety_tier flags
produce distinct JSON, JSON and CBOR decode to same struct, empty
required Vec fields serialize as [] (no skip_serializing_if).

10 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-usmtd cargo test -p
fcp-core --test policy_evaluation_context_serde.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
